title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Upstox - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Upstox - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Upstox in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Upstox:
Upstox is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Upstox!
